concerns.text: FR-007 anchors to 'Methodological Soundness' which is not a defined User Story ID (e.g., US-1, US-2). While the scope of US-2 (Counterfactual Angle Generation) covers the generation of these insights, the explicit reference 'See Methodological Soundness' is ambiguous and does not strictly trace to a numbered story as per the anchoring convention. It should be re-anchored to 'See US-2' or 'See US-2, US-3'.

FR-006 anchors to 'Edge Cases'. While the Edge Cases section describes the scenario, the requirement should explicitly anchor to the User Story it serves to ensure traceability. The logic for handling small datasets is a prerequisite for US-2 (Counterfactual Angle Generation) and US-3 (Integrated Story Synthesis). It should be re-anchored to 'See US-2, US-3'.
